data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The time to acquire a target is a function of the distance to and size of the target.
data.technical_spec: UI elements are designed considering size for ease of access.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The time it takes to make a decision increases with the number and complexity of choices.
data.technical_spec: Simplifies navigation paths to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Average person can keep only 7 (plus or minus 2) items in their working memory.
data.technical_spec: Limits the amount of information presented at once.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects near each other appear to form groups.
data.technical_spec: Aligns related content closely to create logical groupings.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users expect your site to work similarly to other sites.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to common web conventions to avoid user confusion.
